title: unona lepidota
intro: Unona lepidota, also known as the False Kola, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, characterized by its aromatic leaves and seeds. The medicinal properties of Unona lepidota include its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce stress and improve overall well-being. In herbal preparations, Unona lepidota is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
